summary: VenuLoQ Login Page Simplification & Venue Detail Connect Button - All 12 features verified on mobile viewport (390x844)

issues: Secondary VenuLoQ logo/watermark appears overlaying the Google button - minor visual glitch but does not block functionality

login_page_full_brand_logo.details: Full brand logo IMAGE displayed in dark top panel (data-testid='full-brand-logo'), CDN URL: customer-assets.emergentagent.com

login_no_role_selector.details: NO role selector buttons found (RM, Venue, Admin) - correctly removed as per requirements

login_no_demo_credentials.details: NO demo credentials section found - correctly removed as per requirements

login_fits_one_screen.details: Page body height (844px) matches viewport height (844px) - no scrolling required on mobile 390x844

login_essential_elements.details: All essential elements present: Google auth button, email input, password input, Sign In button, Sign Up link

login_flow_works.details: admin@venuloq.in / admin123 login successful - redirected to /admin/dashboard

register_page_brand_logo.details: Full brand logo IMAGE displayed in dark top panel on register page

sticky_cta_connect_and_start_planning.details: Sticky CTA shows 'CONNECT' button + 'START PLANNING' button at bottom of venue detail page

connect_opens_bottom_sheet.details: Clicking Connect opens bottom sheet overlay (data-testid='connect-overlay')

whatsapp_option_with_prefilled_message.details: Chat on WhatsApp option present with wa.me link and pre-filled message about venue interest

callback_option_closes_popup_opens_enqui.details: Request a Callback option closes popup and opens enquiry form modal

close_popup_via_x_or_overlay.details: X button and clicking overlay background both successfully close the Connect popup

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor accessibility issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page has been simplified - no role selector, no demo credentials, just full brand logo + Google auth + email/password. Venue detail StickyMobileCTA now has Connect button that opens bottom sheet with WhatsApp (wa.me link with pre-filled message) and Request a Callback (closes popup, triggers onEnquire for enquiry form).
